comment.body: Alma, I really appreciate what you are doing here. However, considering users cannot search for specific posts in threads, it will likely save you a lot of time to have a highly vetted “questions” thread where current and future subscribers can go to for answers. Having answered questions spread out across multiple “day” threads does not seem like an organized way to help your subs and yourself be more self sufficient and organized. Also, having posts related to market movement and trades be in your “trading signals” thread would also be extremely helpful. These daily threads can be very chaotic and hard to follow.

comment.body:
not directly. not like the short fly pattern that is pinning and theta burning.
MMs are longer gamma towards both wings, so in simulation, the momentum pingpongs between, the vol increases only when the momentum goes into the middle, but suppresses when it approaches the wings.
vanna lvls are near to them. this is why I wrote, we should see custoemr interest to boost itnraday vol to break out of this fly. 
one of the wing will be magnetic. (basod on the price, it is the upper one). and from there, it is vol burning.
